[02# Wanted Level 0]
040A0000 045C0F18 52800008
040A0000 045C0F1C B9002268
040A0000 045C0F20 D65F03C0

[03# Lock task time]
040A0000 00ECB5C0 529FFFEB

[03# Lock task time Off]
040A0000 00ECB5C0 4B0B012B

[05# Locking ammunition and grenades]
040A0000 010DDD38 6B1F010A
040A0000 010DDD58 6B1F014A

[05# Locking ammunition and grenades Off]
040A0000 010DDD38 7100050A
040A0000 010DDD58 7100054A

[06# Locking Car Life]
040A0000 0107FCA0 1E212800

[06# Locking Car Life Off]
040A0000 0107FCA0 1E213800

[07# Keep your weapon after death]
040A0000 003C90A0 D65F03C0

[07# Keep your weapon after death Off]
040A0000 003C90A0 A9BE4FF4
